enabled.description: Indicates whether the schedule is enabled for the team. Required.

isActivitiesIncludedWhenCopyingShiftsEna.description: Indicates whether copied shifts include activities from the original shift.

offerShiftRequestsEnabled.description: Indicates whether offer shift requests are enabled for the schedule.

openShiftsEnabled.description: Indicates whether open shifts are enabled for the schedule.

provisionStatus.description: The status of the schedule provisioning. The possible values are notStarted, running, completed, failed.

provisionStatusCode.description: Additional information about why schedule provisioning failed.

startDayOfWeek.description: Indicates the start day of the week. The possible values are: sunday, monday, tuesday, wednesday, thursday, friday, saturday.

swapShiftsRequestsEnabled.description: Indicates whether swap shifts requests are enabled for the schedule.

timeClockEnabled.description: Indicates whether time clock is enabled for the schedule.

timeClockSettings.description: The time clock location settings for this schedule.

timeOffRequestsEnabled.description: Indicates whether time off requests are enabled for the schedule.

timeZone.description: Indicates the time zone of the schedule team using tz database format. Required.

workforceIntegrationIds.description: The IDs for the workforce integrations associated with this schedule.

dayNotes.description: The day notes in the schedule.

offerShiftRequests.description: The offer requests for shifts in the schedule.

openShiftChangeRequests.description: The open shift requests in the schedule.

openShifts.description: The set of open shifts in a scheduling group in the schedule.

schedulingGroups.description: The logical grouping of users in the schedule (usually by role).

swapShiftsChangeRequests.description: The swap requests for shifts in the schedule.

timeCards.description: The time cards in the schedule.

timeOffReasons.description: The set of reasons for a time off in the schedule.

timeOffRequests.description: The time off requests in the schedule.

timesOff.description: The instances of times off in the schedule.
